segments.text: Say to your brothers, ‘My people!’[^5] and to your sisters, ‘My loved one!’[^6]
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Contend with your mother! Contend, for she is not my wife, 
neither am I her husband; and let her put away her prostitution from her face, and her adulteries from between her breasts;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
lest I strip her naked, and make her bare as in the day that she was born, and make her like a wilderness, and set her like a dry land, 
and kill her with thirst.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Indeed, on her children I will have no mercy, for they are children of unfaithfulness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
For their mother has played the prostitute. She who conceived them has done shamefully; for she said, ‘I will go after my lovers, who give me my bread and my water, 
my wool and my flax, 
my oil and my drink.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Therefore behold, [^7] I will hedge up your way with thorns, and I will build a wall against her, 
that she can’t find her way.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: She will follow after her lovers, but she won’t overtake them; and she will seek them, but won’t find them. Then she will say, ‘I will go and return to my first husband, for then it was better with me than now.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For she didn’t know that I gave her the grain, the new wine, and the oil, and multiplied to her silver and gold, which they used for Baal.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Therefore I will take back my grain in its time, and my new wine in its season, 
and will pluck away my wool and my flax which should have covered her nakedness.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Now I will uncover her lewdness in the sight of her lovers, and no one will deliver her out of my hand.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will also cause all her celebrations to cease: her feasts, her new moons, her Sabbaths, and all her solemn assemblies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will lay waste her vines and her fig trees, about which she has said, ‘These are my wages that my lovers have given me,’
and I will make them a forest, 
and the animals of the field shall eat them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
I will visit on her the days of the Baals, to which she burned incensewhen she decked herself with her earrings and her jewels, and went after her lovers
and forgot me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

Therefore behold, I will allure her, and bring her into the wilderness, 
and speak tenderly to her.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
I will give her vineyards from there, and the valley of Achor for a door of hope; and she will respond thereas in the days of her youth, 
and as in the day when she came up out of the land of Egypt.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It will be in that day,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,

that you will call me ‘my husband,’
and no longer call me ‘my master.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For I will take away the names of the Baals out of her mouth, and they will no longer be mentioned by name.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
In that day I will make a covenant for them with the animals of the field, and with the birds of the sky, 
and with the creeping things of the ground. I will break the bow, the sword, and the battle out of the land, and will make them lie down safely.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I will betroth you to me forever. Yes, I will betroth you to me in righteousness, in justice, in loving kindness, and in compassion.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I will even betroth you to me in faithfulness; and you shall know Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: It will happen in that day, that I will respond,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

I will respond to the heavens, 
and they will respond to the earth;
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
and the earth will respond to the grain, and the new wine, and the oil; 
and they will respond to Jezreel.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
Yahweh
